news.t: Pacer ETFs Launches Two AI-Driven ETFs Leveraging Advanced Machine Learning and Strategic Partnerships

holdings.infoBox: WDAI is an equity ETF with a total of 306 individual holdings. The top holdings are Arm Holdings stock at 1.79%, Marvell Technology at 1.73%, Advanced Micro Devices at 1.39%, Micron Technology at 1.38%, and Dell Technologies at 1.33%.

overview.description: The Pacer S&P World 3AI Top 300 ETF (WDAI) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P World 3AI Top 300 index. The fund passively tracks an index of 300 securities from developed markets with the highest 12-month excess return potential, identified using AI and machine learning. WDAI was launched on May 7, 2026 and is issued by Pacer.

data.title: Pacer ETFs Launches Two AI-Driven ETFs Leveraging Advanced Machine Learning and Strategic Partnerships
data.text: MALVERN, Pa.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Pacer ETFs launches two AI-powered ETFs leveraging machine learning and proprietary alpha signals developed with S&P Dow Jones Indices and 3AI.
